response.justification: Bogdan has over 10 years of full-stack experience with deep proficiency in TypeScript, Node.js, React, Docker, and cloud platforms, directly matching the required stack and responsibilities; his work on AI-agent infrastructure, internal tooling, and scalable systems demonstrates strong alignment with the role’s focus on automation and end-to-end ownership.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with core stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React)
Proven track record in AI-agent infrastructure and internal tooling development
Strong DevOps and infrastructure skills (Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD)
concerns: Limited explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest in resume
German language proficiency is only basic, may hinder local collaboration
Diverse background includes many legacy/obscure technologies, may raise questions about focus
